## Summary

- 

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test-only change

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest backend/tests -q`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] Manual workflow checked

## Security / Data Handling

- [ ] No secrets, `.env` values, SQLite DBs, logs, or build artifacts are committed
- [ ] New long-running work uses `/api/jobs/*` or explains why it does not
- [ ] Cache keys include resolved SHAs or sanitized payload details where relevant
